109 K6B K6B_FLUID_INTAKE 30b(K6b)Average Fluid Intake In Last 7 Days CHAR 1 The actual amount of fluid the patient receive by IV or tube feeding in the last seven days. 0 = None, 1 = 1 to 500 cc/day, 2 = 501 to 1000 cc/day, 3 = 1001 to 1500 cc/day, 4 = 1501 to 2000 cc/day, 5 = 2001 or more cc/day, -1 = Unknown, -2 = Space
